═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Centralization Risk:             ⚠️  CRITICAL
├─ Single owner controls all programs
├─ Single signer for all transactions
├─ No multi-sig protection
└─ Single point of failure

Recommendation: Deploy 3-of-5 MPC multi-sig authority immediately

📊 QUICK QUERY EXAMPLES
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# View complete owner/TX report
cat .cache/owner-tx-hash-verification.json | jq .

# Extract all TX hashes
cat .cache/owner-tx-hash-verification.json | jq '.tx_hash_records.deployment_signatures'

# Get all program IDs and owners
cat .cache/owner-tx-hash-verification.json | jq '.programs | .[] | {name, program_id, owner_address}'

# View explorer URLs
cat .cache/owner-tx-hash-verification.json | jq '.programs | .[] | .explorer_url'


🚀 NEXT ACTIONS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

1. [CRITICAL] Deploy MPC Multi-Sig Authority
   - Replace single-key control with 3-of-5 multi-sig
   - Use src/mpc/mpcCore.js
   - Estimated time: 1-2 hours

2. [HIGH] Verify TX Hashes On-Chain
   - Query each TX signature via Solana explorer
   - Confirm transaction finality
   - Estimated time: 30 minutes

3. [HIGH] Add Program Upgrade Guards
   - Implement 24-48 hour timelock for upgrades
   - Prevent unauthorized program changes
   - Estimated time: 1-2 hours

4. [MEDIUM] Monitor Authority Key Rotation
   - Schedule quarterly DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY rotation
   - Update GitHub Actions secrets
   - Estimated time: 2-3 hours total
